description: Dr Max the Cat wif Hat (MAX) is the world’s first ATC-20 memecoin launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s only ultra-super-fast blockchain network as of 2025. Inspired by Dr Max the Cat, the only feline in history to receive an honorary doctorate from a US-accredited higher education institution (Vermont State University), MAX fuses meme culture, education, and blockchain innovation in a single creative symbol.
name: Dr Max the Cat wif Hat
